title: Cut your APK Size with features on demand
summary: Do APK or app size matters? Does a user think about the APK size before downloading it? Does a user think about space, an app occupying on the phone? Is your App size is more than just a few MBs? What if we provide very basic functionality and let the user decide whether he wants the advanced or additional functionality or not?
content:
• Do APK or app size matters?
  • Does a user think about the APK size before downloading it?
  • Does a user think about space, an app occupying on the phone?
  • Is your App size is more than just a few MBs?

What if we provide very basic functionality and let the user decide whether he wants the advanced or additional functionality or not?
